title: Multidimensional stochastic liquidity in Kyle's model of informed trading
human_review_reason: overall_sir_confidence (0.58) < 0.65 threshold. Root cause: this is a pure stochastic-control/probability theory paper (no neural architecture, no dataset, no training loop), so several SIR sections (architecture, tensor_semantics, training_pipeline, evaluation_protocol) had to be reinterpreted from their ML-oriented schema meaning. Additionally, the paper's own Section 5.7 leaves the general matrix case as an open FBSDE wellposedness problem.
